gnomad.note: rare missense variant; 1000 Genomes reports a very low allele frequency

insilico.note: approximate; predictors do not provide decisive evidence

literature.title: Guidelines for classification of BRCA2 variants in clinically calibrated coldspots.
literature.abstract: BRCA2 missense interpretation studies define regions where missense variation is less likely to be pathogenic, but this C-terminal variant remains classified as VUS in ClinVar.
